qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. / Master's Degree in relevant discipline
qualification.details: School of Forensic Science: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree (minimum 60% or equivalent) i.e. M.Sc. in Forensic Science with specialization in the appropriate field (Physics/ Ballistics/ Biology/ Chemistry/ Toxicology/ Fingerprint/ Questioned Document). OR First class or equivalent Master Degree in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Biology/Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Human-Biochemistry/ Microbiology/ Genetics/ Molecular Biology or any other relevant discipline from recognized university or equivalent with very good academic record throughout. Experience in the field of Forensic Science and relevant field is desirable. School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class or equivalent (minimum 60% or equivalent) at the preceding degree i.e. M.Sc./MCA/ME/M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Security/Cyber Security/ Digital Forensics/Cyber-Forensics/Network Technology/Information-Technology/Data-Science/Artificial Intelligence/ Machine Learning/ IoT Security or relevant discipline from recognized university or equivalent with very good academic record throughout. Experience in the field of Cyber Security and relevant field is desirable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor / Lecturer (School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics)
Assistant Professor / Lecturer (School of Forensic Science)

selection_process: Interview Screening Test (if large number of applications)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFSU Assistant Professor, Lecturer (Contractual) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NFSU Assistant Professor, Lecturer (Contractual) Job 2026 Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFSU Assistant Professor / Lecturer (Contractual) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NFSU Assistant Professor / Lecturer (Contractual) posts is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Professor / Lecturer (Contractual) positions at NFSU Chennai Campus.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. or a Master's degree in a relevant discipline with first-class marks or equivalent. Specific qualifications vary by school.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor and Lecturer positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 90,000/- per month for Assistant Professor (Regular) to Rs. 68,000/- per month for Lecturer.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NFSU recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online. You need to pay the application fee and then fill out the online application form via the provided links.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NFSU recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC/EWS candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, while SC/ST/PwD candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. A screening test may be conducted if there is a large number of applications.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the NFSU Chennai Campus located?
faq.answer: The NFSU Chennai Campus is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600087.

faq.question: Q9. Are these posts permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: These positions are contractual, as indicated in the job title and advertisement.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article for your reference.
